reasoning: Dyrrachium (Dyrrhachium) was an ancient city on the Adriatic coast in the Illyrian region. It lay at the mouth of the Bojana (Bojana) River, in what is now Albania, near present-day Durrës.
output: On the Adriatic coast in Illyria, at the mouth of the Bojana (Bojana) River, in present-day Albania near the city of Durrës.
